nav.announcement: Fair Trade Certified by Label STEP · Free Worldwide Shipping
nav.footerDescription: Authentic handmade Moroccan home goods, crafted by 3rd generation Berber artisans. Rugs, pillows, candles, ceramics, argan oil & brass lamps.

home.metaDescription: Authentic handmade Moroccan home goods — rugs, pillows, ceramics, candles & brass, crafted by 3rd-generation Berber artisans. Based in Madrid, made in the Atlas Mountains.
home.heroSubtitle: Heirloom rugs, brass, ceramic and wood — sourced from the families we have worked with for three generations in the Atlas Mountains.
home.categoriesIntro: Each piece is signed by the family who made it. We name our makers — because the name on a label should mean something.
home.whyDescription: We do not buy from middlemen. We do not approximate. Every rug is signed by the family who tied its last knot — and we pay them, directly, before the loom is cut down.
home.whyQuote: A rug is not made — it is grown, knot by knot, prayer by prayer.

features.handKnottedDesc: By women cooperatives in Aït Bouguemez & Boujad.
features.naturalDyesDesc: Madder root, indigo, walnut husk, pomegranate.

home.customDescription: Bespoke rugs made to your exact size, colour palette, and pattern. We work directly with the cooperative — no intermediaries, no minimums on large orders.
home.visitDescription: We host a small number of guests at the atelier each season. By appointment, never in groups larger than four — the looms keep working, and we don't ask the women to perform.

custom.metaTitle: Design Your Own Moroccan Rug · WEBERBER
custom.metaDescription: Customize your authentic Moroccan rug. Choose patterns, colors, and sizes. Handwoven in the Atlas Mountains.

customizer.title: Custom Rug Studio
customizer.subtitle: Design your perfect Moroccan rug. Handwoven by artisans in the Atlas Mountains.

about.heroSubtitle: Three generations of Berber craftsmanship from the Atlas Mountains

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our products? Need help choosing the perfect piece for your space? We're here to help.
